claims.statement: The Sensear SM1P-Ex is the only ATEX headset with Bluetooth + two-way radio + UL913 certification
claims.basis: Manufacturer specification comparison across all listed products

claims.statement: No standalone ATEX-certified wireless earbuds exist as of June 2026
claims.basis: Market survey of ATEX/IECEx certified audio products from major manufacturers (Sensear, 3M, ecom)

claims.statement: The 3M Peltor LiteCom PRO III Ex is the only headset with built-in radio certified for Zone 0
claims.basis: Product certification review — II 1G Ex ia IIC T4 Ga marking confirms Zone 0

claims.statement: Prices range from ~$400 to ~$2,500 for ATEX certified headsets
claims.basis: Estimated street prices from authorized distributors, excl. VAT. Subject to regional variation.

claims.statement: Charging intrinsically safe headsets must always occur outside the hazardous area
claims.basis: IEC 60079-14 installation requirements — charging circuits exceed intrinsic safety energy limits

methodology: Product specifications sourced from manufacturer data sheets and ATEX/IECEx certificate documents. Prices estimated from authorized distributor listings. Not affiliated with any manufacturer.
